reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content:
산책 다닐때나 집에서 간식보틀로 잘 활용하고있어요.
사이즈가 작아서 주머니에 넣고다니기도 편하고, 작은 사이즈에 간식이 꽤 들어가서 요거 한 통에 다 넣어서 여행다니기도 편해요. 놀러갈 때 간식은 다 간식보틀에 넣어서 다녀요. 조만간 몇개 더 구매할거 같기도 하네요
reviews.content_en: I use it well as a treat bottle when taking walks and at home. The size is small so it's convenient to carry in my pocket, and it holds quite a bit of treats in such a compact size, making it easy to take on trips. When we go out, I put all the treats in this bottle. I think I'll buy a few more soon.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바잇미에서 세번쨰 구매하는 보틀인데 젤루 맘에 드는거같아요ㅋ 전에 위생적으로 사용하려고 유리로 된거 사용했눈데 이뿌긴하나 막상 가지고 다니긴 넘 불편했고 불안했고요. 베이비보틀도 구입했었눈데 뚜껑이 작아서 어디 물을 따라서 먹이기가 옹삭했눈데 요건 뚜껑에 따라먹일수있어 가장 실용적ㅎㅎ 가격도 실용적인데... 깔별로 쟁이고싶어서 큰일 ㅋ
reviews.content_en: This is my third bottle purchase from BITE ME and I think I love it the most ㅋ I used a glass one before for hygiene reasons, and while it looked pretty, it was way too inconvenient and stressful to carry around. I also bought a baby bottle before, but the lid was so small it was awkward to pour water and feed from it. This one you can feed directly from the lid so it's the most practical ㅎㅎ And the price is reasonable too... but now I want to collect all the colors, this is a problem ㅋ

reviews.name: 가****
reviews.content: 매번 간식을 지퍼백에 넣어놓고 보관했는데 미니 간식보틀보고 넘 귀엽고 관리도 편할거같아구매했습니다. 외출할때 갖구가기에도 적당한사이즈! 짱귀여워요🤭
reviews.content_en: I used to store treats in a ziplock bag, but when I saw this mini treat bottle it looked so cute and seemed easy to manage, so I bought it. The size is perfect for taking on outings! It's so adorable 🤭

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 라이트블루랑 화이트 2가지로 샀어요~ 기존에 쓰던 3단 간식보틀이 있는데 조금 간편하고 작은게 필요해서 구매했어요ㅎㅎ 너무 귀여워요ㅎㅎ 처음에 내부 냄새가 좀 나서 세척하고 써야할 것 같아요~ 잘 쓸게요
reviews.content_en: I bought it in light blue and white~ I already had a 3-tier treat bottle, but I needed something more convenient and compact so I got this ㅎㅎ It's so cute ㅎㅎ At first there was a slight smell inside so I'll need to rinse it before using~ I'll use it well!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
자그마하니 너무 귀엽고 앙증맞네요
간식 넣어다닐때 편할것같아요
reviews.content_en: It's so tiny and cute! And it's adorable in that endearing way. It seems like it'll be convenient to carry treats around.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
지퍼가 없는 간식 보관하려고 샀어요!!
가볍고 이쁘고 크기도 적당해서 여행갈때도 들고 가요!
reviews.content_en: I bought it to store treats that don't have a zipper! It's light, pretty, and the size is just right so I take it with me when traveling too!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
✔️너무 귀엽습니다.
✔️아직 아기라 하루 먹을  밥 70그람 정도 들어가요.
✔️여러개 살  걸 후회되더라구요~
✔️물통, 간식통 색별로 구매해야겠어요.
✔️꼭 사세요~~~
reviews.content_en: ✔️ So cute. ✔️ Since my pup is still young, about 70 grams of daily food fits in here. ✔️ I kind of regret not buying more~ ✔️ I should get the water bowl and treat container in different colors. ✔️ You must get this~~~

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content:
밖에 다닐 때 간식이나 사료 소분해 다닐만 한 통이 필요했는데
BPA FREE에 국내산 제조까지 너무 맘에 든 소분통
통에 바잇미 프린팅도 뚜껑 색도 넘 귀여워요 🩵
reviews.content_en: I needed a container to portion out treats or kibble when out and about, and I'm so happy with this one that's BPA FREE and made domestically. The BITE ME printing on the container and the lid color are so cute 🩵

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 놀러가거나 밖에산책용으로 간식이나 물통대용으로 사용 하기좋아요 너무 기엽고작아서 휴대하기 편하네요 다른색상도 구매하려구요
reviews.content_en: It's great to use for trips or walks as a treat or water container. It's so cute and compact that it's easy to carry around. I'm planning to buy other colors too!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽고 가볍고 너무 좋아요 산책할때 가방이 깨끗하게 소분으로 가져갈수 있어서 좋아요 감사합니다 잘 쓸게요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute, light, and just great! When taking walks, I can portion everything nicely in my bag and keep it clean. Thank you, I'll use it well!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
외출하거나 애견카페갈때 너무 유용하게 쓰구있어요!!
기엽고 들고다니기 좋은 사이즈에용ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I use it so much when going out or visiting dog cafes!! It's cute and the size is perfect to carry around ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 작고 너무귀엽네요 4가지사려다가 일단두가지색만 샀는데 추가구매해야겠어요
reviews.content_en: It's so small and adorable! I was going to buy four colors but only got two for now, but I think I need to buy more!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
어우 디자인깔끔하고 사이즈 진짜 귀엽네요
휴대하기 아주 딱이에요!
reviews.content_en: Wow, the design is clean and the size is really cute! It's absolutely perfect to carry around!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바잇미 물병, 물그릇이랑 비슷하게 연한 베이비핑크일줄 알았는데
진한 핑크였네요🥲
그래도 간단하게 먹을것들 담아다니기 좋아요
크지도않고 작지도않은 딱 좋은사이즈입니다!!
reviews.content_en: I thought it would be a light baby pink like the BITE ME water bottle and bowl, but it turned out to be a deeper pink 🥲 Still, it's great for carrying around snacks to eat. The size is just right - not too big, not too small!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 폼이 넉넉하고 좋아요 색깔도 너무 이쁘고 데일리로 손이 많이 갈거 같은 꿀템이에요!! 사이즈가 넉넉해서 두개사서 커플 아이템으로 입어도 좋을 것 같아요^^ 진심 강추입니당
reviews.content_en: The fit is generous and it feels good. The color is really pretty too and it's a honey item that'll get a lot of daily use!! Since the size is generous, I could even buy two and use them as a couple item together^^ Seriously highly recommend!

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
큰 통은 들고다니기 부담스러워서
작은 통 찾고 있었는데 딱 제가 찾던 통이에요 ㅎㅎ
디자인도 너무 귀엽고 뚜껑색도 이쁘고 좋아요!
저는 간식 담을 때도 있고 물 담을 때도 있는데
물 담았을 때 하나도 새지 않아서 좋습니다!
reviews.content_en: The big container was too cumbersome to carry around, so I was looking for a smaller one and this is exactly what I was looking for ㅎㅎ The design is so cute and the lid color is pretty and nice! I sometimes put treats in it and sometimes water, and it doesn't leak at all when filled with water so that's great!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 사료나 간식 담으려고 구매했어요는 핑계고 너무 귀여워서 구매 안할우가 없었어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I bought it to store kibble or treats, but that's just an excuse - it was too cute not to buy ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 아가들 산책나갈때 간식 트릿넣으려고 구매했어여 할인할때사서 잘삿네여 색상도 귀엽고 사이즈도 너무크지않아서 산책가방에 쏙들어가네용 🤗
reviews.content_en: I bought it to put treats and toys in for the pups' walks. I got it on sale and it was a good purchase! The color is cute and the size isn't too big so it fits perfectly in the walking bag 🤗

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
사이즈 너무 귀여워요  ㅎㅎ
가방에 쏙 들어가서 편하고좋아요 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: The size is so cute ㅎㅎ It fits in the bag easily which is convenient and great ㅎ

reviews.name: 용****
reviews.content:
집에서 보상용 간식통으로 딱입니다.
깔끔하고 여닫기도 쉬워
산책시 사용해도 좋아요.

사용해보고 만족하여 추가구매 했어요~^^
reviews.content_en: It's perfect as a reward treat container at home. It's clean and easy to open and close, so it's great to use on walks too. I was so satisfied with it that I bought more~ ^^

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
아 너무 귀여워요❤️ 산책갈때 사료나 미니미니한 간식넣고
필요성이 좋다는 핑크색 귀여우어요🤲🏻
바잇미 최고! 바잇미 최고!
reviews.content_en: Ah it's so cute ❤️ When going for walks I put kibble or mini treats in it, and the pink color that has that practical feel is adorable 🤲🏻 BITE ME is the best! BITE ME is the best!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
애카 다닐때 가지고 다니려고 샀어요
그릇이랑 간식통 세뚜세뚜 ♥︎  컬러도 귀엽고 사이즈도 휴대하기 좋아여
reviews.content_en: I bought it to carry when going out with my pup. The bowl and treat container are a cute matching set ♥︎ The color is adorable and the size is convenient to carry!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 세상에 이거 너무 귀요우다ㅋㅋ 트릿넣어 다니기 딱좋아요~ 휴대용보울도 버터색으로 구매해서 노랭이 세뚜세뚜 카와이이
reviews.content_en: Omg this is so cute ㅋㅋ It's perfect for carrying treats around~ I also bought the portable bowl in butter color so my pup has a matching set and it's so kawaii!

reviews.name: 곽****
reviews.content:
필요한 제품이었는데 할인할때 잘 산 것 같아요!
사이즈도 딱이고 간식 넣어다니기 좋은 것 같아요~
reviews.content_en: It was a product I needed and I think I got a good deal buying it on sale! The size is just right and it's great for carrying treats~

reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content: 2900원에 사서 그런가 프린팅에 좀 하자가 있네요ㅠㅠ.  그냥 사용하는데는 문제 없으니까 써요~~.
reviews.content_en: I bought it for 2,900 won so maybe that's why the printing has some flaws ㅠㅠ But it works fine so I'm using it ~~

reviews.name: 용****
reviews.content:
바잇미 보틀만 20개는 되는 듯.
간식 넣기 편하고, 사이즈 딱 좋고, 열고 닫기도 간편해요.
reviews.content_en: I think I have like 20 BITE ME bottles. It's convenient for putting treats in, the size is perfect, and it's easy to open and close.

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
일단 엄청 귀엽습니다!
앙증맞고 가벼워요 굿굿
귀여워서 미용샵 갈 때 간식 담아서 보낼라구요!
reviews.content_en: First of all, it's incredibly cute! It's adorable and lightweight, great great! Since it's so cute, I'm thinking of sending treats in it when my pup goes to the groomer!

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
항상 산책 간식 지퍼팩에 가지고 다니다가 깔끔하게 가지고 다니고 싶어서 샀어요!
주기적으로 통 닦아서 간식 넣고 다니면 깔끔하니 좋을거같아요ㅎㅎ
사이즈도 산책가방에 넣기 딱 좋아요:)
reviews.content_en: I used to carry treats in a ziplock bag on walks but wanted something cleaner, so I bought this! If I clean the container regularly and put treats in it, it should be nice and clean ㅎㅎ The size is perfect for the walking bag too :)

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
사료나 간식 휴대하기 너무 좋아요.
깔끔하게 휴대하기 좋아서 더 사야되나 고민중입니다
reviews.content_en: It's so convenient for carrying kibble or treats. Since it's clean and easy to carry, I'm wondering if I should buy more.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 사이즈도 아담하니 귀엽고 화이트 색상도 깔끔하니 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: The size is modest and cute, and the white color is clean and adorable too!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 만능보틀! 일단 사이즈 컴팩트해서 좋고 컬러도 귀여움🩵
reviews.content_en: An all-purpose bottle! The compact size is great and the color is so cute 🩵

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
진짜 편해요!!
사이즈도 작고 산책 갈 때 가방에 쇽 넣고 다니기 넘 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's really convenient!! The size is small and it's perfect to just throw into my bag when going for walks

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 간식통 여유분으로 구매했어요 색도 디자인도 귀엽습니다
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a backup treat container. The color and design are adorable

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
노랑노랑하게 너무 귀여운 간식통이에요
사이즈도 미니한게 딱 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's such a cute little yellow treat container! The mini size is just perfect

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무 앙증맞고 귀여워요🫶🏻 강아지 밖에 놀러갈때 들고다닐만 한 조그만 간식통 찾고 있었는데 딱이에요! 유리 소재 단종된 것도 다시 재출시해줬으면 좋겠어요~~!
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable and cute 🫶🏻 I was looking for a small treat container to bring along on walks with my pup, and this is exactly it! I hope they re-release the glass version that's been discontinued~~!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 통 너무 귀여워요 가볍고 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The container is so cute and lightweight hehe

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
노란색 하얀색 두개 있었는데
하얀색이 어디로 갔는지 안보여서 하나 더 구입했어요
크기고 적당하고 플라스틱이지만 견고한 느낌나서 오래쓸가 같아요
reviews.content_en: I had yellow and white ones, but I can't find where the white one went, so I bought another one. The size is just right and even though it's plastic, it feels sturdy, so I think it'll last a long time

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
핑크색상 사서 크런치팝통으로 잘 사용하고 있어서
다른간식 간식통 하려고 노란색상 추가 구입했는데 노랑이도 귀여워요~ 사용하기도 편하고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I bought the pink one and use it for storing crunchy treats, and since I wanted another container for different treats, I purchased the yellow one too. The yellow is also adorable~ It's easy to use and I love it

reviews.name: 용****
reviews.content:
베이비 보틑과 1+1 상품으로 구매했다가
미니 간식보틀이 사이즈며 실용성이 좋아
추가 구매했어요~

집에서나 산책시 딱 좋은 사이즈에요~^^
reviews.content_en: I originally bought it as a 1+1 deal with the baby bottle, but the mini treat bottle has such a great size and practicality that I ended up buying more~ It's the perfect size for home and walks too~~^^

reviews.name: 용****
reviews.content:
이 간식통만 집에 몇 개인지..
크기도 적당하고
사용하기 편해요.
4개 세트 구성으로 조금 싼 가격에도 판매를 해주셨으면 좋겠어요.
reviews.content_en: I have so many of these treat containers at home... The size is just right and it's easy to use. I wish they'd offer a 4-piece set at a more affordable price

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 깔끔하고 사이즈도 좋아요. 집에서는 간식넣어두고 밖에나갈때는 사료 넣어다니기 좋네요. 병안에 손도 들어가니 깨끗하게 씻을수 있어요
reviews.content_en: It's clean-looking and the size is great. I keep treats in it at home and bring it filled with food when I go out. You can fit your hand inside the bottle so you can wash it thoroughly

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 노란색이라 귀엽고 간식 담아서 외출하기 정말 좋아요! 외출할 땐 꼭 항상 챙겨 나가요. 통만 꺼내면 벌써 난리나는 우리집 댕댕이 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's cute because it's yellow and it's really convenient for bringing treats when going out! I always make sure to bring it on outings. Our pup goes crazy the moment we pull out the container hehe

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 전에 써보고 너무 편하고 좋아서 또 오더합니다. 트릿 소분통으로 이만한게 없어여. 작은 습기제거제 같이 넣어주면 금상첨화💚
reviews.content_en: I used it before and found it so convenient and good that I'm ordering again. There's nothing better as a treat container for portions. It would be perfect if they included a small moisture absorber 💚

reviews.name: 테****
reviews.content:
유치원 간식 통으로 쓰고 있어요 
사이즈 작아서 편하면서 귀엽고 플라스틱이라 가벼워서 좋네요
reviews.content_en: I use it as a treat container for daycare. It's convenient because of the small size and it's cute too, plus it's lightweight because it's plastic

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 말해 모해 고민없이 바로 주문하세요 너무 귀여워요 강아지 용품이지만 제가 너무너무 갖고싶을정도로 탐나요 🫣
reviews.content_en: Don't even think twice—just order it right away! It's so adorable. Even though it's a dog product, I want it so much myself 🫣

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
크기가 딱
좋네요 카페갈때나 놀러갈 때 사료나 간식 넣어가려구요
흰색은 역시 깔끔 :)
reviews.content_en: The size is just right. I'm planning to use it for bringing food or treats when I go to cafes or outings. White is always clean-looking :)

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 클것같아서 한개만 구입했는데  노즈워크용간식 소분해놓기  딱 좋은 사이즈네요 다음에 더 구입하고싶어요
reviews.content_en: I thought it might be too big so I only bought one, but it's the perfect size for portioning treats for nose work games. I want to buy more next time

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 사이즈 적당하고 귀엽습니다 :) 개인적으로 더 작은통도 나왔으면 좋을거 같아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The size is just right and it's cute :) Personally, I think it would be nice if they made an even smaller version hehe

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 색이 쨍해서 귀엽고, 맘에 들어요. 무엇보다 소재가 안전한 것 같아 맘에 듭니다
reviews.content_en: The color is bright and cute, and I love it. Most importantly, the material seems safe, so I'm really happy with it

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 미니미니한 사이즈로 가방에 쏙 넣고 다니기 좋아서 2개째 구입했어요 다른 색깔도 구입 예정입니다
reviews.content_en: The mini size makes it perfect to slip into my bag, so this is my second purchase. I'm planning to get other colors too
